title: Hamilton Beach Pro Smart Waffle Maker, Non-Stick, 7 Browning Levels, 5 Programmes, Family Size, Digital Display, Overflow Protection - HB5403T, Silver
features: NON-STICK PLATES: Our high performance non-stick plates make sure your waffles come out light, fluffy, and perfectly golden. No more worrying about burnt waffles or tough cleaning.
7 BROWNING LEVELS: With the 7 adjustable browning settings, you can make the waffles as soft or as crispy as desired. Customise your waffles to suit your taste!

5 PROGRAMMES: Discover endless waffle options with 5 different programs – choose from Belgian, classic, chocolate, buttermilk waffles, and even create your own waffle style. Plus the innovative double heating elements cook your waffles evenly, inside and out. Select your desired texture; whether you like the interior soft and outside crispy or crispy and baked all-through the Pro Smart Waffle Maker lets you do it all.
LCD DIGITAL DISPLAY: The easy to read and use lcd digital panel makes it easy to cook waffles exactly as you would like them. Choose the right program for your desired result.
OVERFLOW PROTECTION: Don’t worry about spills! The Pro Smart Waffle Maker has an overflow channel will catch surplus batter – for mess free waffles!
description: Product Description Discover Hamilton Beach! Discover Hamilton Beach's range of stylish appliances which instantly enhance your kitchen. Not only do they add a touch of elegance to your culinary space but are built to last, meaning you can brew, toast and #cookwithconfidence for many years to come. Trust In The Quality & Innovation of Hamilton Beach Innovation For Over 100 Years With a rich heritage spanning over a 100 years, we have established ourselves as a trusted brand known for our commitment to quality & innovation Quality Assured Built to last with an extensive 2 year cover for peace of mind. *When registered online T&C's apply. America's No.1 Appliance Brand "America's No1 Appliance Brand for combined kitchen electrics and garment care* Source: Circana, based on brand level unit sales 12 months Dec 2023 Chef Approved “Powerful performance delivers professional level results at home.” – Chef Radhika Howarth of Radikal Kitchen #cookwithconfidence Bored of Toast? Introducing The Hamilton Beach Smart Waffle Maker Bored of toast? Why not try something new in the morning with the Hamilton Beach Smart Waffle Maker! Discover endless options with 5 smart functions and 7 adjustable toasting settings to create the perfect waffle... Belgian, classic, chocolate or buttermilk, which ones your favourite? You can even create your own.. The Hamilton Beach Smart Waffle Maker let's you do it all! Watch The Hamilton Beach Smart Waffle Maker In Action! The video showcases the product in use.
